description: Resume optimization rules for RAG-based resume enhancement

chunks.chunk_text: Always start bullet points with strong action verbs. Use: Led, Developed, Engineered, Architected, Implemented, Designed, Optimized, Automated, Spearheaded, Orchestrated. Avoid weak verbs like 'Helped', 'Worked on', 'Was responsible for'.

Quantify achievements whenever possible. Include specific numbers, percentages, timeframes. Examples: 'Reduced processing time by 40%', 'Managed team of 8 engineers', 'Processed 10K+ transactions daily', 'Increased user retention by 25%'.

Use the STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result) for experience bullets. Structure: 'Faced X challenge/situation, implemented Y solution/action, achieved Z measurable result'. Example: 'Facing 3-hour deployment times, automated CI/CD pipeline using Jenkins, reducing deployments to 15 minutes'.
Tailor technical skills to match the job description keywords exactly. If JD mentions 'React.js', use 'React.js' not just 'React'. If JD says 'AWS Lambda', include 'AWS Lambda' not just 'AWS'.

For Data Science roles, emphasize deployed models over academic metrics. Highlight: model deployment to production, scalability (millions of predictions), business impact (revenue, cost savings), A/B testing results, model monitoring.

Data Science resumes should quantify model performance. Include: accuracy improvements (e.g., '92% precision vs 78% baseline'), dataset sizes ('trained on 2M samples'), training efficiency ('reduced training time from 6 hours to 45 minutes').

List specific ML libraries and frameworks from the job description. Common keywords: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, XGBoost, LightGBM, Keras, ONNX, MLflow, Weights & Biases.

For Data Science, highlight end-to-end ML pipeline experience: data collection, EDA, feature engineering, model training, hyperparameter tuning, evaluation, deployment, monitoring. Use phrases like 'full ML lifecycle', 'MLOps practices'.

Cybersecurity resumes must emphasize certifications prominently. List: CISSP, CEH, OSCP, CompTIA Security+, CISM, CISA, GIAC. Place certifications in a dedicated section near the top if the JD mentions certification requirements.

For Cybersecurity roles, list specific security tools proficiency: Wireshark, Metasploit, Nmap, Burp Suite, Splunk, SIEM platforms, IDS/IPS systems, vulnerability scanners (Nessus, Qualys), penetration testing frameworks.

Cybersecurity achievements should quantify risk reduction and incident response. Examples: 'Reduced security incidents by 65%', 'Identified and patched 200+ vulnerabilities', 'Responded to incidents with <2 hour MTTR', 'Conducted 15+ penetration tests'.

Highlight compliance and regulatory knowledge for Cybersecurity roles: GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, SOC 2, ISO 27001, NIST frameworks. Use phrases like 'ensured compliance with', 'implemented controls per', 'audit preparation'.

For Web Development roles, emphasize performance optimization and scalability. Include: page load time improvements, Core Web Vitals scores, caching strategies, CDN implementation, database query optimization, horizontal scaling.

Web Developer resumes should showcase responsive design and cross-browser compatibility. Mention: mobile-first design, accessibility (WCAG compliance), progressive web apps (PWA), cross-browser testing, responsive frameworks.
List modern JavaScript frameworks and tools exactly as in JD: React, Vue.js, Angular, Next.js, Svelte, TypeScript, Webpack, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Material-UI, Redux, Zustand, React Query.

For Backend roles, highlight API design and database optimization. Keywords: RESTful APIs, GraphQL, gRPC, microservices architecture, database indexing, query optimization, connection pooling, caching layers (Redis, Memcached).
Quantify backend performance improvements: API response time reductions, throughput increases (requests/second), database query optimization results, cache hit rates, uptime percentages (99.9% SLA).

For Cloud/DevOps roles, emphasize infrastructure as code and automation. Mention: Terraform, CloudFormation, Ansible, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, GitOps, monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog).

DevOps achievements should quantify deployment frequency and reliability. Examples: 'Increased deployment frequency from weekly to daily', 'Reduced deployment failures by 80%', 'Achieved 99.99% uptime', 'Decreased incident MTTR from 4 hours to 30 minutes'.

List specific cloud platforms and services: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, CloudFront), Azure (VMs, Blob Storage, Functions), GCP (Compute Engine, Cloud Storage, Cloud Functions). Match exact service names from JD.

For Mobile Development, specify platforms and native vs cross-platform. Mention: iOS (Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit), Android (Kotlin, Jetpack Compose), React Native, Flutter. Include app store metrics if available.

Mobile Developer achievements should include user metrics and performance. Examples: 'App with 500K+ downloads', '4.8-star rating on App Store', 'Reduced app size by 35%', 'Improved launch time from 3s to 1.2s', 'Decreased crash rate to <0.1%'.

For AI/ML Engineer roles, highlight model deployment architecture. Keywords: model serving (TensorFlow Serving, TorchServe), containerization (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes), API endpoints, batch vs real-time inference, edge deployment.

AI/ML resumes should emphasize MLOps practices. Mention: experiment tracking (MLflow, Weights & Biases), model versioning, feature stores, automated retraining, model monitoring, data drift detection, A/B testing frameworks.

For NLP roles, list specific techniques and models. Keywords: transformers, BERT, GPT, T5, sentiment analysis, named entity recognition, text classification, machine translation, RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation), embeddings, vector databases.

For Computer Vision roles, specify domains and techniques. Mention: object detection (YOLO, R-CNN), image segmentation, facial recognition, OCR, video analysis, CNN architectures, transfer learning, data augmentation techniques.

Data Analyst resumes should emphasize business impact of insights. Use phrases like: 'Identified revenue opportunity worth $2M', 'Reduced customer churn by 15%', 'Optimized marketing spend saving $500K annually', 'Improved forecast accuracy from 70% to 92%'.

List business intelligence and visualization tools: Tableau, Power BI, Looker, Google Data Studio, Excel (advanced), SQL, Python (pandas, matplotlib). Mention dashboard creation, KPI tracking, stakeholder reporting.
Avoid using personal pronouns (I, me, my, we, our). Start bullets with action verbs directly: 'Developed' not 'I developed', 'Led team of 5' not 'I led a team'.
Keep bullet points concise, ideally 1-2 lines. Combine related achievements. Avoid lengthy paragraphs. Use punctuation sparingly—no periods at the end of bullets in experience section.

For Product Manager roles, emphasize cross-functional collaboration and product metrics. Keywords: roadmap planning, stakeholder management, user research, A/B testing, product analytics, feature prioritization, go-to-market strategy.

Product Manager achievements should include product success metrics: user adoption rates, engagement metrics (DAU/MAU), revenue impact, feature adoption, customer satisfaction scores (NPS, CSAT), time-to-market improvements.

For UI/UX Designer roles, showcase design process and user impact. Mention: user research, wireframing, prototyping (Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD), usability testing, design systems, accessibility, interaction design.

UI/UX achievements should quantify user experience improvements: 'Increased conversion rate by 30%', 'Reduced user drop-off by 45%', 'Improved task completion time by 25%', 'Achieved 4.5/5 usability score', 'Designed for 1M+ users'.

For QA/Test Engineer roles, highlight testing frameworks and automation. Keywords: Selenium, Cypress, Jest, Pytest, JUnit, test automation, CI/CD integration, performance testing (JMeter, Gatling), API testing (Postman, REST Assured).

QA achievements should quantify test coverage and bug detection: 'Achieved 85% code coverage', 'Reduced production bugs by 60%', 'Automated 200+ test cases', 'Decreased testing time from 3 days to 4 hours', 'Found 150+ critical bugs pre-release'.

For Blockchain roles, specify chains and consensus mechanisms. Mention: Ethereum, Solana, Polygon, smart contracts (Solidity, Rust), Web3.js, ethers.js, DeFi protocols, NFTs, consensus algorithms (Proof of Stake, Proof of Work).

Blockchain Developer achievements should include contract deployments and transaction volumes: 'Deployed smart contracts handling $5M+ in transactions', 'Optimized gas fees by 40%', 'Audited 20+ smart contracts', 'Built DApp with 10K+ users'.

Emphasize collaboration and teamwork using phrases like: 'Collaborated with cross-functional teams', 'Mentored junior developers', 'Conducted code reviews', 'Participated in Agile ceremonies', 'Presented at team meetings'.

Include agile methodologies if mentioned in JD: Scrum, Kanban, sprint planning, daily standups, retrospectives, backlog grooming, story pointing. Use phrases like 'Agile/Scrum environment', 'iterative development'.

For leadership roles, emphasize team management metrics: team size, hiring (e.g., 'Hired and onboarded 8 engineers'), performance improvement, retention rates, mentorship programs, technical direction.

Technical Lead resumes should balance technical depth and leadership. Mention: architectural decisions, technical roadmap, code reviews, tech stack selection, technical mentoring, cross-team collaboration.

For Data Engineering roles, emphasize pipeline architecture and scale. Keywords: ETL/ELT, data warehousing (Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery), Apache Spark, Airflow, Kafka, data lakes, stream processing, data quality, partitioning strategies.

Data Engineering achievements should quantify data volume and performance: 'Built pipelines processing 10TB+ daily', 'Reduced data latency from 6 hours to 30 minutes', 'Improved query performance by 10x', 'Migrated 5PB to cloud data warehouse'.

For Game Development roles, specify engines and platforms. Mention: Unity, Unreal Engine, Godot, C++, C#, game physics, multiplayer networking, 3D graphics, optimization for target platforms (PC, console, mobile).

Game Developer achievements should include player metrics and performance: 'Game with 2M+ downloads', 'Optimized frame rate from 30fps to 60fps', 'Reduced memory usage by 40%', 'Shipped 3 titles on Steam'.

For Embedded Systems roles, specify hardware platforms and protocols. Mention: ARM, RISC-V, microcontrollers, RTOS, I2C, SPI, UART, CAN bus, power optimization, firmware development, hardware-software integration.

Embedded Systems achievements should quantify efficiency and reliability: 'Reduced power consumption by 50%', 'Achieved <1ms response time', 'Optimized memory footprint from 256KB to 128KB', 'Deployed to 100K+ devices'.

For Research Scientist roles, balance academic rigor with practical impact. Mention: publications (conferences, journals), research methodology, experimental design, statistical analysis, reproducibility, collaboration with academia/industry.

Research Scientist achievements should include publications and citations: 'Published 5 papers in top-tier conferences (NeurIPS, CVPR)', '200+ citations', 'Presented at IEEE conference', 'Awarded Best Paper', 'Collaborated with MIT researchers'.

Use industry-standard acronyms correctly and consistently. Examples: API (Application Programming Interface), CI/CD (Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment), AWS (Amazon Web Services), SQL (Structured Query Language). Define obscure acronyms on first use.

For Robotics roles, specify robot types and control systems. Mention: ROS (Robot Operating System), computer vision for robotics, path planning, SLAM (Simultaneous Localization and Mapping), sensor fusion, actuators, kinematics, dynamics.

Robotics achievements should quantify automation and accuracy: 'Increased picking accuracy to 99.5%', 'Reduced cycle time by 35%', 'Deployed to 50 production robots', 'Improved navigation success rate from 85% to 98%'.
For AR/VR roles, specify platforms and development tools. Mention: Unity XR, Unreal Engine, Meta Quest, HoloLens, ARCore, ARKit, spatial computing, 3D modeling, gesture recognition, hand tracking.

Replace generic verbs with specific technical actions. Instead of 'made': use 'Built', 'Engineered', 'Architected'. Instead of 'worked with': use 'Collaborated with', 'Partnered with', 'Integrated with'. Instead of 'responsible for': use 'Led', 'Managed', 'Oversaw'.
When describing infrastructure work, use precise technical verbs: Provisioned, Containerized, Orchestrated, Configured, Deployed, Migrated, Scaled, Monitored, Automated, Secured.
For database-related achievements, use specific verbs: Normalized, Indexed, Partitioned, Sharded, Replicated, Optimized, Migrated, Backed up, Restored, Tuned.
When describing machine learning work, use domain-specific verbs: Trained, Fine-tuned, Deployed, Evaluated, Benchmarked, Validated, Optimized, Monitored, Retrained, Experimented.
Include version control and collaboration tools if in JD: Git, GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, pull requests, code reviews, branching strategies (Git Flow), merge conflict resolution.

For customer-facing impact, quantify user satisfaction and reach: 'Served 10M+ users', 'Achieved 95% customer satisfaction', 'Reduced support tickets by 40%', 'Improved NPS from 7 to 9', 'Enabled 50K daily active users'.

Highlight cost optimization and business value: 'Reduced infrastructure costs by $100K annually', 'Saved 200 engineering hours/month', 'Generated $500K in additional revenue', 'Prevented $2M in potential security breaches'.

For Site Reliability Engineering roles, emphasize reliability metrics. Keywords: SLA/SLO/SLI, incident management, on-call rotation, post-mortems, chaos engineering, disaster recovery, redundancy, failover, observability.

SRE achievements should quantify reliability improvements: 'Achieved 99.99% uptime (4 nines)', 'Reduced MTTR from 2 hours to 15 minutes', 'Decreased incident frequency by 70%', 'Automated 90% of operational tasks'.

For Technical Writing roles, emphasize documentation types and audience. Mention: API documentation, developer guides, user manuals, runbooks, architecture diagrams, tutorial creation, documentation platforms (Confluence, GitBook).

When listing programming languages, match JD exactly and indicate proficiency levels implicitly through context. Instead of 'familiar with Python', show usage: 'Built microservices using Python and Flask'.
For IoT roles, specify connectivity protocols and platforms. Mention: MQTT, CoAP, LoRaWAN, Zigbee, Bluetooth LE, AWS IoT, Azure IoT Hub, edge computing, sensor integration, device management.

IoT achievements should quantify device scale and connectivity: 'Managed fleet of 100K+ connected devices', 'Reduced data transmission costs by 60%', 'Achieved <100ms latency for edge processing', 'Improved battery life by 3x'.

Use consistent tense: past tense for previous roles ('Developed', 'Led', 'Implemented'), present tense only for current role ('Developing', 'Leading', 'Implementing'). Never mix tenses within same role.

Avoid buzzwords without context like 'innovative', 'passionate', 'team player', 'detail-oriented'. Instead demonstrate through specific achievements: 'Pioneered company's first microservices architecture' shows innovation better than claiming to be innovative.

For each technical skill mentioned, provide evidence of usage in experience bullets. If resume lists 'Docker' as a skill, should have bullet like 'Containerized applications using Docker' in experience section.

Order experience bullets by impact: most impressive achievements first. Start with quantified business impact, then technical complexity, then routine tasks. Recruiters spend ~6 seconds scanning—put best content first.

For consulting or contracting roles, clarify client industry or domain: 'Consulted for Fortune 500 financial services clients on cloud migration', 'Contracted with healthcare startup to build HIPAA-compliant platform'.

Include relevant side projects or open source contributions if limited professional experience. Mention: GitHub stars, npm downloads, contributor status to major projects, personal projects with user traction.

For Platform Engineering roles, emphasize developer experience and tooling. Keywords: internal developer platforms, self-service infrastructure, developer productivity, build systems, CI/CD tooling, service catalogs.

Platform Engineering achievements should quantify developer productivity: 'Reduced deployment time from 2 hours to 10 minutes', 'Enabled 200+ developers with self-service platform', 'Increased deployment frequency 5x', 'Reduced onboarding time by 60%'.
